# Bonram (Pty) Ltd

> Bonram is a BBBEE Level 1 multi-service B2B company based in Lephalale, Limpopo, South Africa, with branches in Centurion (Gauteng), Secunda (Mpumalanga), East London (Eastern Cape), and Durban (KwaZulu-Natal). Bonram delivers building & construction, facilities management, logistics & transport, sanitation & waste, safety solutions, equipment hire, events management, and security services to government departments, mining companies, and corporates across South Africa.

## Company

- Legal name: Bonram (Pty) Ltd
- BBBEE status: Level 1 (100% Black-owned)
- Head office: 06 Geelhaak Street, Onverwacht, Lephalale, Limpopo, 0557, South Africa
- Branches: Centurion (Gauteng), Secunda (Mpumalanga), East London (Eastern Cape), Durban (KwaZulu-Natal)
- Phone: +27 74 274 8684
- Email: info@bonram.co.za
- Website: https://www.bonram.co.za

## Services

- [Building & Construction](https://www.bonram.co.za/services/building-construction): Civil engineering, roads, sanitation infrastructure, solar PV systems, steel structures, and consulting engineers.
- [Facilities Management](https://www.bonram.co.za/services/facilities-management): Corporate and industrial cleaning, hygiene services, pest control, garden services, and building maintenance.
- [Logistics & Transport](https://www.bonram.co.za/services/logistics-transport): Goods and passenger transport, dangerous goods (gas, petroleum), cross-border (Zimbabwe–SA), clearing and forwarding, import/export.
- [Sanitation & Waste Management](https://www.bonram.co.za/services/sanitation-waste): Mobile VIP and construction toilets, ablution facilities management, waste collection and disposal to registered sites.
- [Safety Solutions](https://www.bonram.co.za/services/safety-solutions): PPE supply (hard hats, gloves, boots, hi-vis), safety signage, road cones, barrier nets, and site safety products.
- [Equipment Hire](https://www.bonram.co.za/services/equipment-hire): Event equipment, generators, mobile toilets, TLBs, excavators, graders, low beds, scaffolding, and power tools.
- [Events Management](https://www.bonram.co.za/services/events-management): End-to-end government and corporate event planning, venue setup, sound and lighting, transport, and on-site management.
- [Security Services](https://www.bonram.co.za/services/security-services): PSIRA-registered guarding, access control, crowd management, and site security.

## Clients

> Bonram serves blue-chip and government clients including:

- Eskom and Eskom Rotek Industries
- ArcelorMittal South Africa
- EXXARO
- Enel Green Power
- Ledjadja Coal
- Agricultural Research Council
- Johannesburg City Power
- South African Police Service (SAPS)
- Lephalale Municipality
- Limpopo Provincial Government departments (Education; Agriculture & Rural Development; COGHSTA; Economic Development, Environment & Tourism; Sports, Arts & Culture)
- National Department of Public Service and Administration

## Accreditations

> NHBRC, CIDB, PSIRA, QCTO, SAIOSH, BEECA Cleaning Association, AVERDA, LEDET, AMPS-Africa, VASA, and SARS Imports & Exports registration.
